notes: This is a Trello board seed JSON derived from the project blueprint.
Trello does not support generic JSON import in the web UI to recreate a board.
Use this file as input for Trello API automation or a custom import script.

board.name: fcode trainc Delivery Board
board.description: Delivery board for fcode trainc using Trello, GitHub Flow, and Scrum-lite.
workingRules: Product Backlog: all unscheduled stories and bugs
Ready for Sprint: refined cards with acceptance criteria, estimate, and assignee candidate
Sprint Backlog: only cards committed in current sprint
In Progress: one primary active card per developer
In Review: card already has PR or is waiting for review/demo verification
Blocked: card cannot move without external help or design decision
Done: merged, verified, and accepted only

automationRules: When a card is moved to In Progress, set start date and add card member.
When a card is moved to In Review, add checklist item PR link attached.
When a card is moved to Blocked, add blocked label.
When due date is within 24 hours and card is not in Done, add priority-high label.
When a card is moved to Done, remove blocked label automatically.

cards.name: [1.1] Scaffold project and Makefile
cards.description:
Story: Set up a complete project structure with Makefile and tooling configuration so the team can start implementing features immediately with consistent build and formatting.

Expected outcome: mingw32-make, mingw32-make clean, and the base structure work.

Files/modules likely touched:
- Makefile
- src/main.c
- include/
- src/
- build/
- bin/

Definition of done:
- Code implemented
- Build passes
- PR opened and linked
- PR approved
- Merged to main

cards.name: [1.2] Define shared data types and constants
cards.description:
Story: Centralize all struct definitions and constants in one header so all modules share consistent data types without circular dependencies.

Expected outcome: all structs/constants compile and are reusable.

Files/modules likely touched:
- include/types.h

cards.name: [1.3] Implement utility helpers
cards.description:
Story: Implement common validation and formatting helpers so all modules can reuse input validation, time formatting, and display name mapping.

Expected outcome: validation, formatting, and naming helpers work.

Files/modules likely touched:
- include/utils.h
- src/utils.c

cards.name: [1.4] Build file I/O and first-run initialization
cards.description:
Story: Implement persistence in a single fileio module so data is saved to .dat files on every mutation and loaded on startup.

Expected outcome: app loads/saves .dat files and creates default admin.

Files/modules likely touched:
- include/fileio.h
- src/fileio.c
- data/

cards.name: [1.5] Implement login/logout/session
cards.description:
Story: Implement login with MSSV and password so users can access the role-appropriate menu and session management is enforced.

Expected outcome: correct login route, lockout logic, and logout flow.

Files/modules likely touched:
- include/auth.h
- src/auth.c
- src/main.c

cards.name: [1.6] Implement change and reset password
cards.description:
Story: Let members change their own passwords and BCN reset passwords for others.

Expected outcome: member can change password, BCN can reset password.

Files/modules likely touched:
- include/auth.h
- src/auth.c
- src/fileio.c

cards.name: [2.1] Add member creation flow
cards.description:
Story: Add new members with full information so the CLB member database is maintained.

Expected outcome: add member, validate MSSV/email, create account.

Files/modules likely touched:
- include/member.h
- src/member.c
- src/fileio.c

cards.name: [2.2] Edit member and recalculate unpaid fines
cards.description:
Story: Edit member information and recalculate unpaid fines when the role changes.

Expected outcome: update member info and recalc unpaid fine state.

Files/modules likely touched:
- include/member.h
- src/member.c
- src/violation.c
- src/fileio.c

cards.name: [2.3] Delete member and cascade related data
cards.description:
Story: Remove a member from the system and delete all related account and violation data safely.

Expected outcome: member, account, and related violations are removed safely.

Files/modules likely touched:
- src/member.c
- src/fileio.c

cards.name: [2.4] View profile and member list
cards.description:
Story: Let members view their own profile and the CLB member list with proper data visibility rules.

Expected outcome: member profile and club list display correctly by role.

Files/modules likely touched:
- src/member.c
- src/main.c

cards.name: [3.1] Record violation and auto-calculate penalty
cards.description:
Story: Record violations with correct timestamps, fines, and penalty logic.

Expected outcome: violation recorded with correct reason, date, and penalty.

Files/modules likely touched:

- src/violation.c

cards.name: [3.2] Implement Out CLB warning and enforcement
cards.description:
Story: Automatically warn and enforce Out CLB thresholds based on consecutive absence and violence rules.

Expected outcome: consecutive absence and violence rules trigger correctly.

Story: Show collected and outstanding fines broken down by team.

Expected outcome: terminal table of paid and unpaid totals by team.

Files/modules likely touched:

cards.name: [4.2] Sort members by violation count
cards.description:
Story: Sort members by violation count without changing the original array order.

Expected outcome: sorted view without changing original array order.

Files/modules likely touched:

cards.name: [4.3] Export violation report to txt
cards.description:
Story: Export a violation report to .txt with timestamp, summary by team, and list of unpaid members.

Expected outcome: report file with timestamp and unpaid summary is generated.

Files/modules likely touched:

cards.name: [4.4] Search violations by date range
cards.description:
Story: Search violations within a date range using time_t conversion from dd/mm/yyyy.

Expected outcome: date filtering by time_t works correctly.

Files/modules likely touched:
- src/report.c
- src/utils.c

cards.name: [OPS-1] Set up GitHub repository and protected main
cards.description: Operational task: initialize GitHub repository workflow and protect main branch.

cards.name: [OPS-2] Create PR template and review checklist
cards.description: Operational task: standardize PR reviews with a shared template and review checklist.

cards.name: [OPS-3] Prepare demo dataset for review and final demo
cards.description: Operational task: prepare realistic demo data for review and the final demo.

cards.name: [OPS-4] Sprint retro action items
cards.description: Operational task: track and close sprint retrospective action items.
